series_metadata.series_description: This is a licensing program for individuals and businesses that own or sell honey bees. Apiaries and Queens are licensed and inspected. All supporting documentation regarding the inspection, findings, and licensure are kept in the division’s Apiary Files but not limited to i.e. ( applications, correspondence, licenses, inspection reports, queen apiary rearing certificates, expense reports, etc.)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Three years ; Electronic: Three years
